description: Platform blocklist — tokens deployed via these platforms are excluded from all scans. These platforms generate low-quality, spam, or bot-deployed tokens that pollute the feed.

blocked_platforms.name: RapidLaunch
blocked_platforms.reason: Automated token factory — generates spam tokens

blocked_platforms.name: 7Tracker / J7Tracker
blocked_platforms.reason: Automated deployer platform — low-quality bot tokens

notes: Add known deployer wallet addresses to blocked_deployer_wallets as they are discovered. The signatures array is matched case-insensitively against token card text (browser) and token descriptions (API).
